creator: wahjava@gmail.com
text:
On Fri, Aug 7, 2009 at 9:20 AM, Edwin Groothuis<edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of deskutils/google-gadgets,
>
> Please note that PR ports/137504 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> Â  Â http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/137504
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>

Thanks for the update. It looks fine to me, though I've to build it in order to approve it. ATM, I'm out of station, and I'll be back in a week. So I'll approve it then.

Thanks
-- 
Ashish SHUKLA

India will always have just enough bandwidth so we can check email. - Gautam Renjen
